_comment: The versioned founding-question set (SPEC INV-227, ROADMAP row 394). Each question a founding asks a host, with the set version it entered and the host-profile key it writes. set_version is the current set version; a host records the version it answered on a founding.set-version profile line, and the daily update check (scripts/check-pack-update.sh, E-25) names each question added past a host's recorded version. Bump set_version and append a question here whenever founding grows what a host owes.

questions.question: what kind of project is this (book, backend, static site, fullstack, CLI, skill pack)?
what are this project's concrete layers and its concrete proof kinds?
for a visual kind, what checkable design principles must its surfaces hold?
the agent card — does this tree carry its self-declaring card at .live-spec/agent.md?
beyond the kind-independent C-1 floor, what composition axes does this project's kind owe every surface (or none beyond the floor)?
